G0.label:
Φ : Type
inst✝ : DecidableEq Φ
l r : List Φ
Γ Δ : List (Form Φ)
h : Cal l r [] []
a : Φ
al : a ∈ l
ar : a ∈ r
ll lr : List Φ
leq : l = ll ++ a :: lr
rl rr : List Φ
req : r = rl ++ a :: rr
p : Proof' (a :: ll ++ lr) (a :: rl ++ rr) [] []
⊢ Proof' (ll ++ a :: lr) (a :: rl ++ rr) [] []
